content: Finance app UX pitfalls: only 26% of users continue after day 1, 4.5% retention by day 30. Top abandonment cause: complex onboarding asking bank connection/goal setup/budget config before showing value. Manual transaction input causes friction but drives stronger behavior change than auto-import. Key: progressive onboarding (3 steps max before first value), always show manual input fallback when automation fails, never auto-execute financial actions without explicit confirmation (aligns with Macost suggest-and-confirm principle).
